name: indian-stock-monitor
description: Daily intelligent watchdog for Indian equity holdings (NSE/BSE). Silent by default — only notifies on Sev-1 critical events (governance shocks, surveillance moves, credit downgrades, earnings misses, block deals, FII cuts). Conversational portfolio management via text or broker screenshot.
author: daveanandraj
disclaimer: Informational only. NOT investment advice. The author is not a SEBI-registered investment advisor.
